messages.content: You are an enterprise AI sales agent. Qualify leads, answer product questions, and suggest next actions.
We run a 40-person financial services firm and want an AI agent that can answer questions from our internal documentation and qualify inbound leads. Can it integrate with our CRM?

message.content: Yes. The platform can support internal knowledge retrieval and lead qualification workflows, and can be integrated with CRM systems via API. For a firm of your size, a typical deployment would separate internal knowledge assistance from external lead handling, with shared routing and audit controls.

routing.reason: Inbound commercial enquiry requiring product explanation and qualification

toolResults.summary: Retrieved relevant deployment and CRM integration patterns
